name: Chipper Cash Africa Cross-Border Payment API
what_it_does: Chipper Cash Africa cross-border payment REST API for fintechs and businesses to send and receive money across 14 African countries including Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Uganda, Rwanda, Tanzania, Zimbabwe, Zambia, South Africa, and Côte d'Ivoire with instant settlement and competitive FX rates for remittance, gig economy disbursement, and merchant payment automation. Enables AI agents to manage cross-border money transfer for Africa remittance automation, handle local currency disbursement for Africa gig economy payment automation, access mobile money integration for Africa MNO payment automation, retrieve payment status and confirmation for Africa transaction automation, manage FX rate lock for Africa currency conversion automation, handle recipient verification for Africa KYC automation, access transaction history for Africa payment analytics automation, retrieve payment receipt for Africa compliance documentation automation, manage bulk payment disbursement for Africa payroll automation, and integrate Chipper Cash with African marketplaces, fintechs, and gig platforms for end-to-end Africa cross-border payment automation.
use_cases: Sending cross-border payments across Africa from remittance automation agents
Disbursing gig economy payments to African workers from payroll agents
Processing multi-country Africa MNO mobile money from disbursement agents
Converting currency for Africa cross-border transactions from FX agents
not_for: Non-Africa payments (Chipper is Africa-specific cross-border platform)
Real-time card processing (Chipper is bank/mobile money transfer, not card acquiring)
Enterprise corporate treasury (Chipper is SMB and consumer transfer focused)
best_when: An African fintech, marketplace, or global platform wanting AI agents to automate cross-border money transfer, gig economy disbursement, and multi-currency payment across 14 African countries through Chipper Cash's Africa-native payment platform.
avoid_when: BUSINESS API ACCESS REQUIRES PARTNERSHIP: Chipper Cash business API requires formal partnership agreement; automated self-service integration without partnership creates unauthorized access; automated API access requires Chipper Cash business development engagement. KYC VERIFICATION REQUIRED PER RECIPIENT: Chipper Cash cross-border transfers require recipient KYC verification; automated disbursement must ensure recipient is KYC-verified; automated unverified recipient payment creates compliance failure. FX RATE IS INDICATIVE UNTIL LOCKED: Chipper Cash FX rates are indicative until locked at transaction initiation; automated cross-border payment must lock rate before initiating; automated rate assumption without lock creates actual rate difference at settlement. COUNTRY AVAILABILITY CHANGES: Chipper Cash country coverage is evolving; automated payment routing must verify destination country is supported; automated hardcoded country list creates routing to unsupported country.

auth.notes: Chipper Cash uses API key for business API authentication. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, CA HQ (Africa-focused). Founded 2018 by Ham Serunjogi and Maijid Moujaled. Backed by Jeff Bezos, Ribbit Capital, SVB ($305M raised, post-SVB restructured). Products: Cross-border transfer, FX, mobile money, card payments. FCA regulated (UK entity). 14 African countries. Competes with Flutterwave for Africa cross-border.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — business agreement required
pricing.paid_tiers: FX spread 1.5-3.5% on cross-border transfers; flat fees by corridor; volume discounts
pricing.notes: San Francisco CA. FCA regulated UK entity. FX spread model. Per-corridor fees. Partnership required.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; transfer and FX APIs throttled; webhooks for transfer events

known_agent_gotchas: FX RATE LOCK IS TIME-LIMITED: Chipper Cash FX rate quote is valid for limited time window; automated payment must lock rate and initiate transfer within quote validity; automated delayed transfer after rate quote creates rate expired error at execution

MOBILE MONEY FORMAT VARIES BY COUNTRY: Recipient mobile money identifier format varies by country and MNO (Ghana: Vodafone Cash format, Kenya: M-Pesa format); automated disbursement must format recipient ID correctly per country; automated generic phone format creates invalid recipient identifier

TRANSFER STATUS IS ASYNC: Chipper Cash cross-border transfers may take minutes to hours to settle depending on corridor; automated fulfillment must use webhook or poll for final status; automated immediate fulfillment after transfer initiation creates premature confirmation

COMPANY STABILITY CONSIDERATION: Chipper Cash went through significant restructuring post-SVB collapse (2023); automated integration should monitor service continuity; automated dependency on Chipper without fallback creates single point of failure for Africa payments

CORRIDOR-SPECIFIC LIMITS APPLY: Transfer limits vary by country corridor and recipient account type; automated bulk disbursement must stay within per-transfer limits; automated bulk single transfer exceeding limit creates limit exceeded error
agent_readiness.security_notes: Africa cross-border. FCA regulated. API key. US/Africa. Transfer and FX data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Africa cross-border. FCA regulated. API key. US. Transfer and FX data.
